title: Two Monks
writer: Juan Bustillo Oro, José Manuel Cordero
actors: Víctor Urruchúa, Carlos Villatoro, Magda Haller
plot: When the Monk Javier acts violently in a gothic monastery, the Prior asks the Monk Juan to calm him down since he believes that Javier is possessed by demons. When Juan comes to Javier's cell, they recognize each other and Javier ...
